title: SEARCH INPUT

icon.value: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>

meta: Primary search input for keywords, advertisers, or domains.

query_param_config.name: query
query_param_config.label: Search Query
query_param_config.hint: The search term — auto-filled from user input

query_param_config.name: list
query_param_config.label: Suggestion List
query_param_config.hint: Which suggestion source list to use (e.g. google)

search_variants.label: Basic + Keyboard Shortcut
search_variants.key_ui_elements: ⌘K badge on right of input; clear (×) button appears once text entered

search_variants.label: Filter Chips
search_variants.trigger_mechanism: Chips below bar toggled by user
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Removable chip pills showing active filters under the input

search_variants.label: Autocomplete Dropdown
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Dropdown split into Suggestions section and Recent History section

search_variants.label: Scoped / Contextual Search
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Scope badge on left of input (e.g. 'in: Design'); click caret to cycle scopes

search_variants.label: Voice Input
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Mic icon on right; click simulates transcription state

search_variants.label: Loading State
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Spinner replaces clear button while results are fetching

search_variants.label: Rich Result Rows
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Each row: thumbnail icon + highlighted match text + path + type badge

search_variants.label: Boolean / Advanced
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Operator buttons below input + field selector dropdown (type, author, etc.)

search_variants.label: Command Palette
search_variants.key_ui_elements: Fuzzy match list with keyboard shortcut hints per item on the right

title: SEARCH TYPE
meta: Scopes the search to keyword, advertiser, domain, or precise match.

title: PLATFORMS

icon.value: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>

meta: Select which ad platforms to include in results. All platforms selected by default.

title: DATE

icon.value: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="6"/><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="10" x2="21" y2="10"/></svg>

meta: Filter ads by when they were first seen or last active. Choose a preset range or set a custom window.

title: SORT BY

icon.value: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="15" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="9" y2="18"/></svg>

meta: Choose the field to sort results by, and whether to show highest or lowest values first.

title: AD TYPE

icon.value: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><polyline points="8 21 12 17 16 21"/></svg>

meta: Filter by ad creative format. Available options change based on selected platform.

title: ENGAGEMENT
meta: Filter ads by engagement metrics: likes, shares, comments, impressions, popularity, and budget.

title: CALL TO ACTION
meta: Filter ads by call-to-action button text.

title: LANGUAGE
meta: Filter ads by the language they are written in.

title: GENDER
meta: Filter Facebook ads by target gender.

title: AGE
meta: Filter Facebook ads by target age range.

title: META ADS LIB
meta: Show only ads that appear in the Meta Ads Library.

title: VERIFIED
meta: Show only ads from verified accounts.

title: COUNTRY
meta: Filter ads by the country they are targeted to.

title: ECOMMERCE PLATFORM
meta: Filter ads by the ecommerce platform used on the landing page.

title: FUNNEL TYPE
meta: Filter ads by the type of funnel used on the destination page.

title: MARKETING PLATFORM
meta: Filter ads by the marketing automation or page-building platform detected.

title: TRAFFIC SOURCE
meta: Filter ads by the detected traffic source type.

title: AFFILIATE NETWORK
meta: Filter ads by the affiliate network detected on the landing page.

title: AD POSITION
meta: Filter YouTube and Google ads by their position in the page or video.

title: IMAGE SIZE
meta: Filter GDN display ads by banner image dimensions.

title: NATIVE NETWORK
meta: Filter native ads by the ad network they run on.

title: BUDGET
meta: Ad Budget for TikTok with low, medium, high options

title: CATEGORY
meta: Filter ads by product or service category. Supports two-level nested selection.
